About us

At Routine Labs, we are building Europe's first secure, auditable, and EU-compliant automation infrastructure for legacy systems.

Mission

We're taking a practical approach to improving how engineers work with AI systems. Combining LLMs with familiar software engineering methods to make it easier for people to build, modify and maintain software automations. Our platform lowers the effort required to turn natural-language instructions into deterministic, testable code that can interface with and automate legacy systems.
